cutBroaderDirection: full security, bouncer, stern gatekeeper, noir doorman, or authority redesign

minimumKeepCriteria.requirement: Clearly reads as the approved soft Santa-adjacent Otis identity at full size and at app scale.
minimumKeepCriteria.cutIf: Face, age, body, beard, wardrobe, or warmth drift toward generic hotel staff, Santa costume, or authority figure.

minimumKeepCriteria.requirement: Boundary feels apologetic, prepared, and helpful.
minimumKeepCriteria.cutIf: Pose reads as angry, scolding, suspicious, smug, police-like, bouncer-like, villainous, or patronizing.

minimumKeepCriteria.requirement: At 96 px tall, the raised pause hand, rounded beard, slight belly, and ledger/keycard side anchor remain legible.
minimumKeepCriteria.cutIf: Hand disappears, ledger merges into coat, belly is flattened, beard becomes a blob, or the pose turns into unreadable clutter.

minimumKeepCriteria.requirement: Native source is 4096 px or larger, full-body, transparent or cleanly separable, with safe padding.
minimumKeepCriteria.cutIf: Low native resolution, cropped fingers or feet, haloing, noisy edges, background contamination, or production sheet output.

minimumKeepCriteria.requirement: Pose can idle with subtle breathing, tiny ledger settle, and reduced-motion freeze without needing new runtime logic.
minimumKeepCriteria.cutIf: Gesture requires large arm swings, threshold props, separate scene objects, or animation that would block mobile UI.

minimumKeepCriteria.requirement: Only one restrained prop family is visible: plain ledger or small brass keycard/keyring.
minimumKeepCriteria.cutIf: Multiple props compete, any prop has text/logo, a velvet rope appears, or brass becomes ornamental noise.

probeBudget.expandOnlyIf: default outfit probe passes tone, identity, source-quality, and app-scale silhouette checks
probeBudget.stopRule: Any source-preflight failure or hostile tone read cuts the opportunity immediately.

promotionBlockers: No generated image exists in this lane.
Coordinator must generate and preflight a native source before considering the probe.
Coordinator must confirm the pose does not replace the canonical safe alert pose unless it wins review.
